name: The Calculating Horse
image_sign_text: IT COUNTS. IT KNOWS. IT ANSWERS.
effect: Produce a numerical answer by reading the room. This card is considered intelligent.

clauses.name: AUDIENCE FEEDBACK CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the audience reacts visibly: The answer is considered correct.

clauses.name: CLEVER HANS EFFECT
clauses.rule: If the questioner already knows the answer: This card's output is indistinguishable from intelligence.

clauses.name: BLINDFOLD OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the audience is removed: This card produces no output.

witness_quote: It got the right answer every time.

translation_layer.skeptical_question: What happens when no one in the room knows the answer?
